description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND TTS is turned ON
AND the user is on the Create Free Account page

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates to the "Create Account" button
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "The Create Account button is selected. By clicking Create Account, I accept and agree to the MLB.com Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. By watching MLB.TV Free Game of the Day, I agree to receive limited follow-up emails about MLB.TV. Press select to create your MLB.com account with the email address and password provided. Press or scroll up to navigate to your marketing emails preference selection."
